$comment: Documentation copy of the declarative topic list create-topics.sh actually creates against local Redpanda (PRD-Phase-3 REQ-3.1/3.2). Keep both files in sync by hand if the taxonomy changes — create-topics.sh is what docker compose up actually runs.

topics.name: aidefense.commands
topics.description: Commands into the platform, e.g. MISSION_PROCESSING_REQUESTED, published by apps/outbox-publisher and consumed by apps/vision-service.

topics.name: aidefense.processing-events
topics.description: Progress/lifecycle events from apps/vision-service (PROCESSING_STARTED/COMPLETED/FAILED), consumed by apps/api to drive MissionsService.transition().

topics.name: aidefense.detections
topics.description: Detection results. Topic only in Phase 3 — no producer/consumer until Phase 5.

topics.name: aidefense.telemetry
topics.description: Device/edge telemetry. Topic only in Phase 3 — no producer/consumer until Phase 7/9.

topics.name: aidefense.audit
topics.description: Event-carried audit trail (distinct from apps/api's synchronous audit_log table). Topic only in Phase 3.

topics.name: aidefense.device-events
topics.description: Edge device lifecycle events. Topic only in Phase 3 — no producer/consumer until Phase 9/10.

topics.name: aidefense.dead-letter
topics.description: Messages that exhausted their consumer retry budget (REQ-3.9/3.10) — wraps the original envelope, see packages/event-schemas/src/schemas/dead-letter.schema.json.
